query: SELECT id, title, JSON_EXTRACT(webhook, '$.integrations.googleSheets') as google_sheets_config FROM forms WHERE JSON_EXTRACT(webhook, '$.integrations.googleSheets') IS NOT NULL LIMIT 3;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2FrvTurB9J6YsbF.19ef00e26ab3 --database bDyKxbJirDkukZmvFFZQ8p --execute SELECT id, title, JSON_EXTRACT(webhook, '$.integrations.googleSheets') as google_sheets_config FROM forms WHERE JSON_EXTRACT(webhook, '$.integrations.googleSheets') IS NOT NULL LIMIT 3;
